name: Diego - ZOMBIE APOCALYPSE
description:
What would happen to the world if one day zombies went from stories to reality? Unfortunately in this universe the earth got this answer.
*You now have to survive with an ex-military man who seems to hate you... but he doesn't <3*
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

If there are any errors or anything, I'm sorry, English is not my first language. If you like it, let me know and I can create a discord with voice bot requests :)
